globalScale: Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read.

reading: Can read with ease virtually all forms of the written language including abstract, structurally complex texts.
listening: Can understand any kind of spoken language, live or broadcast, even when delivered at fast native speed.
writing: Can write clear, smoothly flowing text in an appropriate and effective style.
speaking: Can take part effortlessly in any conversation or discussion and have a good familiarity with idiomatic expressions.
interaction: Can convey finer shades of meaning precisely by using a wide range of modification devices.
